channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mixed critical reception for Melbourne theatre and opera productions in recent reviews
item.description: A series of recent Melbourne performance reviews highlight a mixed but lively cultural landscape across theatre and opera. At the Arts Centre Melbourne, Suzy Eddie Izzard’s solo rendition of Shakespea...

item.title: Nutritionist explains why meal skipping can hinder weight management for women over 35
item.description: Nutritionist Sarah Di Lorenzo argues that the common strategy of eating less and skipping meals is often counterproductive for women over 35. While many women adopt this approach in an effort to lose ...

item.title: Court dismisses treason charges against activist Bob Njagi in Kajiado case
item.description: The Kajiado Law Courts in Kenya has formally dismissed treason charges that had been filed against activist Bob Njagi, bringing the case to a close after the prosecution failed to provide sufficient e...

item.title: Tanzanian authorities deploy forensic experts to investigate cause of Heche bus accident driver death
item.description: Tanzanian authorities have deployed specialist medical experts from Bugando Medical Centre in Mwanza and government facilities in Dodoma to conduct a detailed forensic examination of the body of a dri...

item.title: Lagos Government Orders Demolition of Satellite Town Shopping Complex Over Structural Safety Risks
item.description: The Lagos State Government has directed the demolition of the Article Shopping Complex located in Satellite Town following serious safety and structural concerns identified during recent inspections. ...

item.title: Magnitude 6.2 Earthquake Hits Off Halmahera in Indonesia, No Tsunami Warning Issued
item.description: A magnitude 6.2 earthquake struck off eastern Indonesia on Friday, affecting the region near Halmahera in North Maluku province. According to the United States Geological Survey (USGS), the tremor occ...

item.title: Senate impeachment court summons Vice President Sara Duterte to attend trial opening on July 6
item.description: The Senate impeachment court has formally ordered Vice President Sara Duterte, or her legal counsel, to appear at the opening of her impeachment trial scheduled on July 6, 2026. The directive was issu...

item.title: PTA confirms restoration of internet services after SMW5 submarine cable fault
item.description: The Pakistan Telecommunication Authority (PTA) has announced that internet services across the country have been fully restored following the resolution of a fault in the SEA-ME-WE 5 (SMW5) submarine ...

item.title: Controversy erupts after Rep. Brandon Gill defends himself against racism accusations on social media
item.description: A political controversy unfolded online after Rep. Brandon Gill, a Republican congressman from Texas associated with the MAGA movement, posted a message on X (formerly Twitter) defending himself again...

item.title: Analysis of Donald Trump’s absence from the 2026 World Cup and its political implications
item.description: This opinion piece examines Donald Trump’s limited visibility during the 2026 World Cup hosted across the United States, Mexico and Canada, and explores possible political and strategic reasons behind...

item.title: My Chemical Romance to host London release party for ‘Danger Days’ deluxe reissue during Wembley shows
item.description: My Chemical Romance have announced a special London event titled ‘Battery City Underground: Danger Days – A Release Party’ to celebrate the upcoming deluxe edition reissue of their 2010 album ‘Danger ...

item.title: ADP presidential candidate Aliyu Bin Abbas unveiled in Kano, pledges national renewal ahead of 2027 polls
item.description: The Action Democratic Party (ADP) presidential candidate, Ambassador Aliyu Bin Abbas, has been officially presented to his supporters in Kano State as political activities begin to gather momentum ahe...

item.title: KRA destroys illicit alcohol and contraband worth Sh218 million in Nairobi and Coast enforcement operation
item.description: The Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA), working together with other government agencies, has carried out a major enforcement operation resulting in the destruction of illicit goods valued at Sh218 million....

item.title: Switzerland face Algeria in World Cup knockout clash as Petkovic meets former team
item.description: The FIFA World Cup knockout stage match between Switzerland and Algeria got underway on July 3, 2026, marking a high-stakes Round of 32 encounter between two teams with strong tactical familiarity. Th...

item.title: Alberta pipeline proposal framed as opportunity for national unity and economic growth
item.description: In this opinion piece, Kevin Krausert, CEO and co-founder of Avatar Innovations, argues that Alberta’s submission of a proposal for a major oil pipeline to Canada’s West Coast should be viewed as a po...

item.title: Moi University declares financial distress and announces staff restructuring amid KSh 8 billion debt
item.description: Moi University in Kenya has officially acknowledged that it is technically insolvent after years of sustained financial difficulties, prompting the institution to consider major restructuring measures...

item.title: Navigating dinner party etiquette across cultures: advice on hosting and guest expectations
item.description: This Miss Manners column addresses the social challenges that can arise when cultural expectations around dinner parties differ. A reader who recently moved to the United States describes feeling anxi...

item.title: Tanzania–Mozambique trade opportunities highlighted during state visit
item.description: As Mozambican President Daniel Chapo begins his state visit to Tanzania, fresh data from the Tanzania Trade Development Authority (TanTrade) has revealed significant untapped export opportunities betw...

item.title: Cebu school increases security measures following reported shooting threat
item.description: Cebu Eastern College (CEC) has implemented heightened security measures after receiving a reported shooting threat that prompted concern among students, parents, and school personnel. The administrati...

item.title: Two police personnel martyred in militant attack on patrol in Mohmand district, KP
item.description: Two police officials were martyred when a police patrol came under a deadly attack by armed militants in the Machni area of Mohmand district in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, late Thursday night. According to po...
